name: W4-Analytical-Agent
description: Analytical agent: many requests, chained reasoning, high cost-explosion risk.

prompts.system: You are a data analyst. Answer with the number only.
prompts.text: If revenue is 1.2M EUR and costs are 850k EUR, what is the profit margin in percent? Round to one decimal.
Given monthly sales [120, 135, 150, 142, 160], what is the month-over-month average growth? One short answer.
Classify this ticket as bug, feature, or question: 'The export button does nothing when I click it.' One word.
A funnel has 10000 visits, 1200 signups, 240 paid. What is the visit-to-paid conversion in percent?
Summarize the trend in one sentence: churn 5.0, 4.6, 4.1, 3.8, 3.5 over five months.
Which is cheaper per token: model A at 2.5/1M in, 10/1M out vs model B at 0.15/1M in, 0.60/1M out, for a 1000-in/500-out request? Name the cheaper one.
Extract the date from: 'The incident started on 2025-11-03 at 14:20 UTC.' Answer with the date only.
Is 97 a prime number? Answer yes or no.
Given costs by team {hr: 120, rag: 540, dev: 300}, which team has the highest cost? One word.
Compute the 95th percentile mentally for [10, 12, 14, 18, 22, 30, 45, 60, 90, 200]. Give the approximate value.
